title: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva
display_title: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva
wikitext:
[]: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Jun 24, 2019 9:01 pm In anticipation for the Neflix release, I decided it could be a good idea to recycle some older threads and evidence that is not super well known to try and make an article on the Wiki about the final scene in End of Evangelion. Mainly, I wanted to dispel some notions like that Asuka came back because Shinji wished her into materializing or something, or the Adam & Eve theories. Instead, I think it's clear Asuka came back on her own, and even chose to lay by Shinji's side on her own. Here it is, I think it's good enough but I welcome any suggestions. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_An ... Evangelion

[]: Re: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Fri Jun 28, 2019 1:15 pm Interesting. I never considered that Shinji might've been alone for a little and might've been going slightly insane as a result of the isolation. I do wonder though...If it's been a few weeks since Instrumentality ended, what on Earth did he eat? How is still alive and not succumb to the elements... Just from how the movie started in the morning and the last scene is at night, I always assumed it was the same day..But the article does make a convincing argument. And one other thing. The link for Endings A and B doesn't't appear to be working...What were they exactly? I know it mentions B being darker, but it doesn't explain why...

[]: Re: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Fri Jul 12, 2019 7:41 pm Last A is detailed in the article, Last B, if I recall correctly, is Shinji on the ground, but holding a hand, thinking "I'll never see them again. They're gone, but I'm alive, so I'll keep on living" then the camera pans to reveal Shinji is holding a disembodied arm and he's completely alone on that beach. Credits roll just like in Last A.
summary: []: Wiki article on the end of End of Eva             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Jun 24, 2019 9:01 pm In anticipation for the Neflix release, I decided it could be a good idea to recycle some older threads and evidence that is not super well known to try and make an article on the Wiki about the final scene in End of Evangelion. Mainly, I wanted to dispel some notions like that Asuka came back because Shinji wished her into material

Mainly, I wanted to dispel some notions like that Asuka came back because Shinji wished her into materializing or something, or the Adam & Eve theories. Instead, I think it's clear Asuka came back on her own, and even chose to lay by Shinji's side on her own. Here it is, I think it's good enough but I welcome any suggestions. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_An ... Evangelion
